name: Poppy Escape
description: Poppy Escape is a horror game where your mission is to escape dark corridors of an ancient underground and avoid scary huggy wuggy monsters, try to find the exit on each level or collect given amount of toys to progress.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot R - Reload Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Adventure, First Person Shooter, Horror, huggy, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D
